name: Fiserv
description: Fiserv — US-based financial services technology company offering Clover POS, payment processing, and merchant acquiring globally.

seo.title: Fiserv — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: Fiserv: Fiserv — US-based financial services technology company offering Clover POS, payment processing, and merchant acquiring globally.

when_to_use: Clover POS system integration for US retail and restaurant merchants
Merchant acquiring and payment processing for US mid-market businesses
Embedded payment processing via Clover API for POS ISV partners
Back-office payment and reconciliation infrastructure for enterprise merchants

review.verdict: Scale and reach are real, but developer experience and agility lag far behind modern fintech alternatives.
review.best_for: Enterprises and banks needing Clover POS or broad acquiring
review.not_for: Developer teams wanting clean APIs and rapid iteration

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales pricing; no explicit peak-lock evidence.
